text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's time again for the annual summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Daiwa Scarlet learns that her rival, Vodka, will be
participating this year.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She vows to train hard this summer and become
number one in the autumn Tenno Sho.
